summary: Red-team review signal for CPL-04 meeting_minutes_artifact extraction over context_bundle + transcript_artifact + gate_evidence. Eleven findings (no S4): seven S3 attack vectors covering hallucinated decisions, missing assignee/due-date status, fake source_turn_id, fake source_segment_id, mismatched source pair, line_index drift, gate evidence bypass, and direct artifact write; two S2 hygiene items on bundle linkage and provider-adapter egress; one S1 on source_coverage forgery; one S0 on docstring evidence-only posture. All S2+ findings closed in-batch via fix actions CPL04-FIX-001..009 with regression tests in tests/transcript_pipeline/test_meeting_minutes_extractor_cpl04.py. This is a non-authority review signal; canonical control ownership remains with the appropriate canonical owner.

findings.description: A decision row with no source_refs and no rationale could surface a hallucinated finding while satisfying a permissive schema (legacy required only decision_id and description).
findings.recommendation: Schema decision_record sets anyOf [source_refs, rationale] with additionalProperties: false. eval_decision_grounding re-checks the same invariant. Deterministic extractor only emits decisions on explicit markers and always pins source_refs.

findings.description: An action item could omit assignee and due_date entirely, masking unknown ownership as a normalized output.
findings.recommendation: Schema requires assignee OR assignee_status='unknown' AND due_date OR due_date_status='unknown'. eval_action_item_completeness re-checks. Deterministic extractor sets the explicit status when no marker resolves.

findings.description: Forged source_refs with a fake source_turn_id or source_segment_id could pass schema validation by satisfying patterns alone.
findings.recommendation: validate_minutes_source_refs indexes both real corpora and rejects FAKE_SOURCE_TURN_ID / FAKE_SOURCE_SEGMENT_ID. The extractor invokes the validator before returning so no path emits fake refs.

findings.description: A source_ref could pair a real source_turn_id with a real but unrelated source_segment_id, splitting the evidence trail.
findings.recommendation: Validator cross-checks segment.source_turn_id == ref.source_turn_id; raises SOURCE_PAIR_MISMATCH. Schema descriptions call out the invariant.

findings.description: line_index drift could keep both ids real but bind to a wrong line, breaking replay.
findings.recommendation: Validator raises LINE_INDEX_DRIFT when ref.line_index != turn.line_index. Extractor pre-checks segment-vs-turn alignment and raises SEGMENT_LINE_INDEX_DRIFT when the bundle itself drifted.

findings.description: Gate evidence bypass: a caller with failed_gate, missing_gate, conditional_gate, malformed target_artifact_ids, or missing eval_summary_id could trigger extraction.
findings.recommendation: Extractor requires gate_status == passed_gate, both transcript and bundle ids in target_artifact_ids, and a non-empty eval_summary_id. Raises GATE_NOT_PASSED, MISSING_GATE_TARGET_IDS, GATE_TARGET_MISMATCH, MISSING_EVAL_SUMMARY_ID.

findings.description: Direct artifact write: a caller could hand the extractor's payload to ArtifactStore.register_artifact and skip PQX, losing pqx_execution_record emission and trace propagation.
findings.recommendation: Pure function returns payloads WITHOUT content_hash; the store rejects direct registration. run_meeting_minutes_extraction_via_pqx is the only sanctioned write path. test_direct_artifact_store_write_rejected locks the contract.

findings.description: A bundle whose source_artifact_id does not match the supplied transcript could be paired by mistake, breaking lineage.
findings.recommendation: Extractor raises BUNDLE_SOURCE_LINK_MISMATCH before any extraction work runs.

findings.description: A caller could request extraction_mode='provider_adapter' expecting a transparent live network call.
findings.recommendation: Extractor raises PROVIDER_ADAPTER_UNAVAILABLE when no adapter is wired in. Tests never wire a live adapter; no network egress occurs in tests.

findings.description: source_coverage could be silently fabricated to overstate evidence breadth.
findings.recommendation: Validator recomputes total_turns / referenced_turns / referenced_segments and raises SOURCE_COVERAGE_MISMATCH on drift.

findings.description: Module docstrings could omit the evidence-only boundary statement, risking misreading the artifact as a routing signal.
findings.recommendation: Module docstring and schema description fields state the evidence-only role; review artifacts use authority-safe vocabulary; test_authority_safe_vocabulary_in_module scans the surface.
